title: IUSOT Toast Rack, Toast Cooling Rack, Toast Bread Rack Holder, Stainless Steel Plated 8 Slice Toast Rack, Toast Rack for Air Fryer, Air Fryer Accessories, 15.5x8.5cm
features: 【Durable 304 Stainless Steel】: Made from high-quality 304 stainless steel, the IUSOT 8 Slice Toast Rack is rust-resistant and designed for long-lasting durability, ensuring your toast rack remains in excellent condition.
【Optimal Size】: Measuring 15.5x8.5cm, this toast bread rack holder is perfectly sized to fit in most air fryers and ovens, making it a versatile addition to your kitchen accessories.
【Lightweight Design】: Weighing only 51g, this toast rack is easy to handle and transport, providing convenience without compromising on sturdiness.
【Efficient Toasting】: The 8-slice capacity allows for even spacing and efficient toasting of bread slices, ensuring perfectly crisp and evenly toasted bread every time.
【Multipurpose Use】: Ideal for use in air fryers, ovens, and toasters, this stainless steel bread rack is perfect for toasting bread, reheating pastries, and organizing toast during meals.
description: Features: 1. Introducing the IUSOT 8 Slice Toast Rack, your go-to kitchen accessory for perfectly toasted bread every time. 2. With dimensions of 15.5x8.5cm, this toast rack is optimally sized to fit comfortably in most air fryers and ovens, making it a versatile tool for your kitchen. Despite its robust construction, the rack is lightweight, weighing only 51g, which makes it easy to handle and transport. 3. The IUSOT Toast Rack features an 8-slice capacity, allowing you to toast multiple slices of bread simultaneously. And you can choose 4 slice 6 slice or more. Whether you're preparing breakfast for the family or organizing a brunch, this toast rack is a reliable companion. 4. Beyond just toasting, this multipurpose stainless steel bread rack is ideal for reheating pastries, organizing toast during meals, and more. Its sturdy construction and versatile design make it a must-have accessory for any kitchen. 5. Enhance your cooking experience with the IUSOT 8 Slice Toast Rack. Its combination of durable material, optimal size, and efficient toasting capabilities make it the perfect addition to your kitchen arsenal. Specifications: Name：Toast Rack Material：Stainless Steel Size：15.5x8.5cm Package Included: 1x Toast Rack Note: 1. Color difference may occur due to different displays, the actual color shall apply to the actual product received. 2. Manual measurement, the size will have a slight error.
